fixture_notes: BuyerRecon-side enumerated invalid-cases catalogue. Each entry is one offending JSON fragment a future PR#14f fixture-consumer test (and any future AMS-side fixture test) must reject. expected_reject_reason_family records WHO enforces the rejection: pr14b_validator_* families are enforced by today's PR#14b validateBridgeMapperInput / validateBridgeCandidate; pr14f_fixture_privacy_value_scan is required FUTURE work in PR#14f (current PR#14b validator does NOT claim general recursive URL/query/email-shape value scanning). See ./README.md for the precise PR#14b vs PR#14f boundary.

invalid_cases.description: Required version field missing — bridge_contract_version omitted from the candidate root.
namespace_key_candidate is not 'buyerrecon' — alien product namespace.
Unknown surface label outside the v0.1 universal-surface taxonomy.
buyerrecon_actionability_band uses an AMS WindowState enum value ('in_window') — BuyerRecon-side band must be one of hot_now / warm_recent / cooling / stale / dormant / insufficient_evidence.
Unknown conversion_proximity_indicator key outside ALLOWED_CONVERSION_PROXIMITY_INDICATORS allowlist.

Raw URL-shaped string embedded as a VALUE under a non-forbidden key. PR#14b validator rejects raw-URL KEYS via FORBIDDEN_PII_KEYS, but does not claim general value-shape scanning. PR#14f fixture privacy value scan must reject this.
Query-string-shaped string embedded as a VALUE under a non-forbidden key. PR#14b validator does not claim general value-shape scanning. PR#14f fixture privacy value scan must reject this.

Email-shape string embedded as a VALUE under a non-forbidden key. PR#14b validator rejects email-shape KEYS via FORBIDDEN_PII_KEYS, but does not claim general value-shape scanning. PR#14f fixture privacy value scan must reject this.
Full session_id KEY present anywhere in candidate. session_id is in FORBIDDEN_PII_KEYS — PR#14b recursive key scan rejects today.
Forbidden AMS runtime KEY 'ProductDecision' appears in payload. PR#14b recursive AMS-reserved-name scan rejects today via FORBIDDEN_AMS_PAYLOAD_KEYS.
Forbidden AMS runtime KEY 'ProductFeatures' appears in payload. PR#14b recursive AMS-reserved-name scan rejects today via FORBIDDEN_AMS_PAYLOAD_KEYS.
AMS Fit reason-code namespace string 'FIT.PRICE_VISITED' appears as a string VALUE. PR#14b recursive ^(FIT|INTENT|WINDOW)\.[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$ value scan rejects today.
AMS Intent reason-code namespace string 'INTENT.HIGH' appears as a string VALUE. PR#14b recursive ^(FIT|INTENT|WINDOW)\.[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$ value scan rejects today.
AMS Window reason-code namespace string 'WINDOW.IN_WINDOW' appears as a string VALUE. PR#14b recursive ^(FIT|INTENT|WINDOW)\.[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]*$ value scan rejects today.
Negative integer count where a non-negative integer is required (poi_count = -1).
Fractional value where an integer count is required (unique_poi_count = 2.5).
Customer-facing / verdict KEY present in payload (customer_facing: true). PR#14b recursive forbidden-key scan rejects today via FORBIDDEN_PII_KEYS.
